message:
fix(hashing): include missing fields and sort collections in content hash computations across 9 modules

Harden content_hash / fingerprint functions to prevent hash collisions
from missing fields or insertion-order sensitivity:

- benchmark_coverage_saturation_gate: include gini_coefficient, entropy,
  max/min_family_share, and all family_coverages in build_evidence hash
- causal_intervention_planner: prepend self.version to CausalDag content_hash
- capability_witness: include po.justification in CapabilityWitness fingerprint
- controller_composition_stability_gate: replace signals.len() with sorted
  full iteration of signal_id/severity/risk_score plus boolean presence flags
- flamegraph_pipeline: include benchmark_run_id and evidence_node_id in
  build_artifact_id
- revocation_chain: include full revocation body (target_type, target_id,
  reason, issued_by, issued_at, zone) for tamper detection
- specialization_rollback_gate: sort blocking_reasons before iterating in
  DecisionReceipt fingerprint
- transport_certificate_ledger: sort degradation_reasons and components by
  component_name before hashing
- workload_manifold_transfer: prepend self.version to TransferManifest
  content_hash

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
